display_text: Idol of Scree'Auk, Tier 4: Neutral item providing an active ability, False Flight, granting 50% slow resistance, phased movement, and 25% evasion for 5 seconds. Serves as a powerful defensive and repositioning tool to escape slows and projectiles with a moderate cooldown. Stats: CD: 30s, Duration: 5s, Slow Resist: 50%, Evasion: 25%, Phased Movement.
